introParagraph1: Under the Housing (Wales) Act 2014, most private landlords must be registered and licensed. Registered community landlords are exempt from requirements to be registered and licensed.
introParagraph2: You can check your landlord’s registration status by searching
publicRegisterLinkText: Rent Smart Wales’ Public Register (opens in new tab)
question: Is your landlord an exempt landlord under Part 1 of the Housing (Wales) Act 2014?

errors.landlordRegistered: Select whether your landlord is an exempt landlord under Part 1 of the Housing (Wales) Act 2014
